news.text:
Polymarket bettors appear to have insider-traded on a market designed to catch insider traders.
At least 12 wallets collectively made over $1 million bettin
news.summary: Polymarket上至少12个钱包在ZachXBT调查结果公开前通过内幕交易获利超100万美元，其中一名交易者以0.14美元均价买入后获利41.1万美元。

news.text: Trump Media to Airdrop Crypto Tokens to Shareholders in February
news.summary: 特朗普媒体的加密空投事件受关注度高，但项目本身影响力有限，且加密市场对名人相关项目的反应存在不确定性

news.text: According to an investigation into the ZachXBT insider probe event on Polymarket, more than 3.63k addresses bet on “Axiom,” with 56.2% ending up profitable. Amo
news.summary: Polymarket上ZachXBT内幕调查事件中，超3630个地址押注“Axiom”，56.2%盈利；前10高盈利地址中8个涉内幕，合计盈利超120万美元；3个地址盈利超10万，47个在1万至10万间，2个亏损超10万，50个在1万至10万间。

news.text: BLOOMBERG: Polymarket Insider-Trading Bet May Have Attracted More Insiders
news.summary: 彭博社消息，Polymarket平台的内幕交易押注事件可能已吸引了更多内幕人士参与。

news.text: Circle shares tap $90 as Bernstein sees ‘clear divergence from crypto,’ Mizuho flags Polymarket boost https://www.theblock.co/post/391518/circle-shares-90-berns
news.summary: Circle股价触及90美元，Bernstein认为其与加密货币存在明显分歧，Mizuho指出Polymarket对其有提振作用。

news.text: Kalshi investigates insider trading, a first for prediction markets
news.summary: Kalshi对内幕交易展开调查，这在预测市场领域尚属首次

news.text: Prediction markets are drawing in major institutional interests but the regulatory path forward remains a question mark. Coinbase Head of Litigation @RVanGrack
news.summary: 预测市场吸引主要机构兴趣但监管路径存疑，Coinbase诉讼主管@RVanGrack与主持人@JennSanasie、@renato_mariotti讨论监管机构将如何应对该蓬勃发展的领域

news.text: Prediction Markets Under Fire: Coinbase vs. The States https://x.com/i/broadcasts/1qxoNeNamPyJv
news.summary: Coinbase与美国部分州就预测市场相关问题产生争议，预测市场正面临监管层面的压力。
